summary: On merged main, moving the configured QA host folder away made Dashboard and Settings report status missing with visible recovery guidance; app did not crash.
On merged main, Reset All Data from Settings returned to Setup, cleared Skillbox metadata, and preserved QA host/project fixture folders.
After reset on merged main, the renderer showed first-run Setup rather than a blank window; dashboard core output had no active host and zero counts.
Reset on merged main cleared metadata tables and preserved schema_migrations version 23 with dirty=0.
